description: Vidor from Solflare discusses the journey of onboarding EVM users to Solana, highlighting the development of a Solana plugin for MetaMask and the integration of bridging assets from EVM chains to Solana.
topic_summary: The talk covers the challenges and solutions in onboarding EVM users to Solana, including the creation of a Solana plugin for MetaMask and partnerships with bridging services like dbridge to facilitate asset transfers [t=1:68].
